note: The other direction: when the SAME activity was already pinned within the lookback window, check_action_idempotency returns ok:false (isDuplicate). Coverage is not satisfied, so the reviewer must NOT approve — the deterministic downgrade holds and dedup is real (a re-accept can't double-pin). This proves the fix didn't turn the gate into a rubber stamp.
